title: La pérdida
overview: A reflection on the exile of an entire intellectual, scientific and academic elite that was forced to flee Argentina due to the political violence of the sixties and seventies.

trailers.title: Trailer LA PÉRDIDA, de Enrique Gabriel y Javier Angulo (Maestranza Films) 2009.
